summary:
The average diameter does not show significant changes by this age; thus, a reasonable estimate from provided options would be chosen based on general knowledge applicable up until middle-aged adulthood without substantial increase or decrease noted between ages 18-25.
The exact value cannot pinpoint due lack of direct evidence but can reasonably infer it remains within normal youthful range as per dental literature review findings available here today.
